source: Phase 12.5 per-crypto threshold recalibration (Rec 3 of alpha-recovery scorecard). LIVE n=209 + Phase 4 n=218 = combined n=427 grid search of skip_min_bps multipliers per crypto. Selected mult that maximizes PnL with WR >= 87%.

bps_thresholds_changed_from_v1.BTC: unchanged (1.5x at this threshold was already PnL-optimal)
bps_thresholds_changed_from_v1.ETH: 4.81 -> 12.0 (2.5x of v1). v1 had n=64 -$2.69 vs n=16 +$0.82 at 2.5x; severely under-discriminating.
bps_thresholds_changed_from_v1.SOL: 6.49 -> 13.0 (2.0x of v1). v1 had n=68 -$0.54 vs n=27 +$3.02 at 2x; clear inflection.
bps_thresholds_changed_from_v1.DOGE: unchanged (1.5x already optimal: n=36 +$1.47 vs n=2 +$0.04 at 3x).

sigma_for_bb_fair_bps_per_min: computed from vol_30m at evaluation time
notes: These thresholds become the HARD SKIP gate. The 5tier scheme's `s_bps` (align signal, 1.5x mult) and `bps_strong` (5tier sizing, 2x mult) continue to use multipliers OF THE NEW THRESHOLD - intentionally conservative for ETH/SOL/XRP given the cost-asymmetry concern surfaced in alpha-recovery audit. BTC/DOGE behavior is unchanged.
